executable.title: GenerateCircles
executable.description: Generates two 2D binary circle images from user-supplied physical parameters and saves each as NRRD (with metadata) and PNG.

parameters.label: Output Files
parameters.description: Output image paths for img1 and img2

image.name: outputNRRD1
image.label: Output NRRD img1
image.description: Output NRRD file for img1. Retains spacing, origin, and direction cosines.

image.name: outputPNG1
image.label: Output PNG img1
image.description: Output PNG file for img1. Pixel data only, no physical metadata.

image.name: outputNRRD2
image.label: Output NRRD img2
image.description: Output NRRD file for img2. Retains spacing, origin, and direction cosines.

image.name: outputPNG2
image.label: Output PNG img2
image.description: Output PNG file for img2. Pixel data only, no physical metadata.

parameters.label: Image 1 Parameters
parameters.description: Physical geometry and circle definition for img1

double-vector.name: spacing1
double-vector.label: Spacing img1 (mm/px)
double-vector.description: Pixel size in mm along each axis (x y). Example: 0.5,0.5

double-vector.name: origin1
double-vector.label: Origin img1 (mm)
double-vector.description: Physical coordinate of pixel index (0,0) in mm (x y). Example: 0.0,0.0

double-vector.name: directionCosines1
double-vector.label: Direction Cosines img1
double-vector.description: Row-major 2x2 direction cosine matrix (d00,d01,d10,d11). Identity (x-right y-down): 1.0,0.0,0.0,1.0

integer-vector.name: sizePixels1
integer-vector.label: Canvas Size img1 (px)
integer-vector.description: Image canvas width and height in pixels (x y). Example: 300,300

double-vector.name: centerMM1
double-vector.label: Circle Centre img1 (mm)
double-vector.description: Circle centre in physical space in mm (x y). Example: 50.0,50.0

parameters.label: Image 2 Parameters
parameters.description: Physical geometry and circle definition for img2

double-vector.name: spacing2
double-vector.label: Spacing img2 (mm/px)
double-vector.description: Pixel size in mm along each axis (x y). Example: 0.5,0.5

double-vector.name: origin2
double-vector.label: Origin img2 (mm)
double-vector.description: Physical coordinate of pixel index (0,0) in mm (x y). Example: 0.0,0.0

double-vector.name: directionCosines2
double-vector.label: Direction Cosines img2
double-vector.description: Row-major 2x2 direction cosine matrix (d00,d01,d10,d11). Identity (x-right y-down): 1.0,0.0,0.0,1.0

integer-vector.name: sizePixels2
integer-vector.label: Canvas Size img2 (px)
integer-vector.description: Image canvas width and height in pixels (x y). Example: 600,600

double-vector.name: centerMM2
double-vector.label: Circle Centre img2 (mm)
double-vector.description: Circle centre in physical space in mm (x y). Example: 200.0,200.0
